name: Shepherd's Pie 7
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut Hot Italian Sausages lengthwise and slice into 1/4 inch thick pieces.
2. Peel and cut Potatoes into 1-inch chunks.
3. Cook ground beef and sausages in a medium skillet until meat loses some of its pink color and releases juices. Add tomatoes, mushrooms, garlic, and vinegar. Simmer uncovered, stirring occasionally and breaking up tomatoes for about 10 minutes. Stir in peas, basil, salt, oregano, and pepper. Simmer for another 10 minutes.
4. Boil Potatoes until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain and transfer to a large mixing bowl. Beat milk, cheese, butter, remaining salt, and pepper into the potatoes until smooth.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F.
6. Spoon meat mixture into two quart shallow casserole dishes.
7. Spread potato mixture evenly over the top of the meat.
8. Bake until golden and bubbling, about 45-50 minutes.
9. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
